title: Popcorn Mod
description: A simple mod that adds popcorn in the game.
body:
![POPCORN MOD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1dcab0ea814f5c3bce234d65a6d27a7bfd95ea1.png)


![Only for Forge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ea2ae61fc694e83a4b7973d3565d7e8817dd153.png)

# Mod Details
A simple mod that adds popcorn to the game! That's all, it doesn't have much else.

_This mod is made with MCreator, because I'm too lazy to figure out how to use JDK, Gradle, and the 10 million other things you need for Minecraft mod development. Also I don't want to re-learn Java. The first time was bad enough._

## Versions
Forge 1.12.2
(I'm working on a 1.20.1 port right now! Keep patient!)





### Made by Turtledevv
